item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested new access-control channel, frames it as another instance of repeated downstream routing/queue splits, references the prior pattern across repair, false-report, venue-conflict, and access-card cases, and moves upstream to unified intake, queue ownership, rules, and responsibility. It does not provide any usable implementation step or copy for opening the new channel."}
